mapper.select: SELECT homepage_id, menu_idx, html_idx, html, add_id, add_ip, add_date FROM CMS_MENU_HTML WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{menu_idx} ORDER BY html_idx DESC
SELECT html FROM CMS_MENU_HTML WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{menu_idx} AND html_idx = #{html_idx}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT homepage_id, menu_idx, html_idx, html, add_id, add_ip, add_date FROM CMS_MENU_HTML WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{menu_idx} ORDER BY html_idx DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
SELECT NVL(temp_html, '') AS html FROM CMS_MENU WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{menu_idx}
SELECT homepage_id, menu_idx, file_idx, path, orig_filename FROM CMS_MENU_TEMP_FILE WHERE homepage_id = #{homepage_id} AND menu_idx = #{menu_idx}
